data.title: URSB Bancorp, Inc. Announces Expected Closing Date of Initial Public Offering
data.description: In Carteret, New Jersey on March 20, 2026, URSB Bancorp, Inc. has officially obtained all necessary regulatory approvals for its initial public offering as the planned holding entity for United Roosevelt Savings Bank. This milestone marks a crucial step in the company's journey towards completing its IPO process.

data.title: LEAH KATEB, THE "PEOPLE'S PRINCESS", UNVEILS NEW POMEGRANATE PRINCESS SCENT FOR SKYLAR
data.description: Skylar has unveiled Pomegranate Princess, a new fragrance inspired by Persian culture and culinary delights. The launch coincides with the Persian New Year and will be available at Sephora on National Fragrance Day. This enticing scent is set to captivate consumers with its unique blend of ingredients.

data.title: Southern Glazer’s Wine & Spirits Extends Distribution Agreement and Expands Footprint with Pernod Ricard USA
data.description: Southern Glazer's revealed today an extension of its distribution agreement with Pernod Ricard USA. The agreement will continue to allow Southern Glazer's to distribute Pernod Ricard USA products across various markets.

data.title: MUSASHI JAPAN by TAIMATSU Launches “Road to Shogun” – A Journey Through Craftsmanship and Discovery
data.description: Musashi Japan by TAIMATSU Co., Ltd., a modern Japanese knife brand known for its dedication to craftsmanship and cultural fusion, has unveiled its latest immersive initiative called "Road to Shogun." This campaign, identified as the brand's most extensive customer experience yet, encourages patrons to engage with Musashi Japan stores to delve into the traditions, culture, and artistry that influence the brand. With a focus on the path to expertise, this experiential journey seeks to offer insight into the brand's ethos.

data.title: KiddeFenwal Advocates for Food Truck and Trailer Fire Safety with Arrival of Spring Events Season
data.description: KiddeFenwal, a leading company in the fire suppression and safety controls sector, is highlighting the start of Spring by emphasizing the importance of fire safety during outdoor events hosted by municipalities. They are urging fire marshals and other stakeholders involved in fire safety codes to address the risks associated with food trucks and trailers that do not have proper fire suppression systems in place. This reminder comes as these mobile food units continue to attract crowds and may pose a threat due to inadequate safety measures.

data.title: ADA's price at $0.27 shows mixed signals with RSI at 46.92. Potential breakout to $0.29 or pullback to $0.25 predicted.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cardano is currently trading at a price of $0.27, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) reading of 46.92. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a breakout to a resistance level of $0.29, or a pullback to a support level of $0.25, according to current momentum indicators.

data.title: BIOXYTRAN, INC. finishes $1.2M private funding round.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 3.8%, the lowest figure recorded in the past five years. This positive development has led to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter stands at 5.2%, surpassing the previous estimate of 4.7%. Analysts predict a further drop in the unemployment rate in the upcoming months if this trend of job creation continues. The government has expressed satisfaction with the economic progress and aims to focus on sustaining this growth in the future.

data.title: WATERPIK™ UNVEILS THE PROMAX™ WATER FLOSSER WITH SMARTADVANCE™ MODE MARKING THE FUTURE OF GUM HEALTH
data.description: A cutting-edge water flosser called PROMAX™ has been launched, featuring automatic adjustment of water intensity for enhanced gum health restoration, rather than mere improvement. Set to revolutionize oral care, this device is introduced on World Oral Health Day by WATERPIK™, the leading water flosser brand as endorsed by US dental professionals. Based in FORT COLLINS, Colo., the innovation signifies a breakthrough in the industry towards promoting better oral hygiene.

data.title: Breescape™ Offers Seasonal Sales on Cooling Sleep Solutions to Promote More Restorative Rest
data.description: Take advantage of discounts of up to 20% on bedding items, enjoy 10% off on pillowcases, and get a whopping 50% off on the top-rated AiryWeave™ Cooling Pillow. This offer comes from Breescape™, a renowned bedding brand committed to promoting cool, comfortable, and rejuvenating sleep experiences for customers. These discounts are part of the seasonal deals being offered, providing significant savings to potential buyers.

data.title: Spring Eye Allergy Season Arrives Early in the San Fernando Valley
data.description: A local optometrist in Sherman Oaks, California, has pointed out that itchy and red eyes experienced by residents may not solely be due to allergies. As of March 20, 2026, the spring eye allergy season has started in the San Fernando Valley area. Individuals in the region are experiencing symptoms commonly associated with allergies, potentially leading them to overlook other underlying causes.

data.title: XRP price tests $1.50 resistance as bulls target March breakout. Currently trading at $1.44 with RSI at 50.82. MACD signals caution.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently being traded at $1.44, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 50.82. Analysts interpreting the technical indicators believe there is a possibility of XRP reaching a resistance level of $1.49. However, caution is advised for short-term investors as the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) shows a bearish signal, potentially impacting the price movement.

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Senior Housing REIT Janus Living to Make Public Debut
data.description: A pre-market advisory is released daily by the NYSE directly from its trading floor. On March 20, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange issued this update. Investors can access the NYSE Pre-market update for valuable insights before the market opens. This initiative aims to provide crucial information to traders early in the day, helping them make informed decisions. This update is an essential tool for market participants, offering insights into potential trends and shifts in stock prices. Make use of this daily pre-market report to stay ahead in the rapidly changing stock market environment.

data.title: A Notebook Built for Real Life: YSMART Launches the "All-Proof" Field Notebook on Kickstarter
data.description: Engineered to endure rain, spills, pressure, and daily chaos, this innovative carbon fiber notebook defies traditional standards. Typically, notebooks cater to ideal settings: pristine desks, dry spaces, and cautious handling. However, life is unpredictable. This robust notebook is crafted to withstand the unexpected - from coffee spills to rugged conditions.

data.title: BARK Determines Not to Pursue Transaction Following Review of Previously Disclosed Proposals
data.description: BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK) announced an update on potential acquisition offers. The Company received an initial proposal on January 9, 2026, from Great Dane Ventures, LLC, formed by some of the Company's stockholders, to purchase all outstanding shares of BARK's common stock. This proposal is non-binding and indicative. BARK did not disclose specific financial details or terms of the offer. The Company is actively considering this proposal and will provide further updates as the situation develops.

data.title: Savaria Declares Monthly Dividend
data.description: In Laval, Quebec on March 20, 2026, Savaria Corporation ("Savaria") (TSX: SIS) announced a dividend of 4.67 cents ($0.0467) per common share. The dividend, consistent with their monthly dividend strategy, will be paid on April 10, 2026, to shareholders recorded in the Corporation's books as of the end of business on March 31, 2026. This dividend is classified as eligible as per the Income Tax Act. Savaria is a prominent player in the accessibility sector on a global scale.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Core & Main Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Core & Main, Inc. (NYSE: CNM) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, March 24th. Analysts predict the Missouri-based company will post earnings of 42 cents per share, an increase from 34 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for Core & Main's quarterly revenue stands at $1.6 billion, down from $1.7 billion a year ago. Earlier this year, on January 26th, Core & Main finalized the acquisition of Pioneer Supply. Despite this news, the company's shares experienced a slight decrease of 0.4%, closing at $47.50 on Thursday. For more in-depth analysis and updated ratings, interested parties can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.
